title: Edge Platform Gateway - Missing Cross-AZ Failover
description: Edge gateway is deployed in single AZ (us-east-1a) with no automated failover. An AZ outage causes complete feed loss. No manual response checklist exists for rapid failover. This is a critical path for all core service workflows.

title: Request Router - Retry Storm Risk with Missing Circuit Breaker
description: Request router has exponential retry logic without circuit breaker protection. Downstream timeout causes retry cascade exhausting connection pools. Configuration allows infinite retry loops with exponential backoff starting at 10ms. Policy engine timeout already triggered this in production.
mitigation_gap: No circuit breaker deployed despite incident

title: Policy Engine - No SLO Target Defined
description: Policy engine has no defined SLO, making performance degradation undetectable by alerting systems. Service has 4 critical downstream dependencies and no latency SLA. Missing SLO target (field is null) prevents baseline-aware monitoring.

title: State Manager - Critical Single Point of Failure
description: State manager is a critical dependency for 4 Tier-1 services (request-router, policy-engine, workflow-executor, fulfillment-service). It's the only source of truth for current shared state. A failure blocks all core service workflows. Currently deployed with cross-AZ failover but no multi-region replication.
mitigation_gap: No read replicas in secondary region

title: State Analytics - No SLO Target Defined
description: State analytics service has null SLO target, preventing objective performance monitoring. Single AZ deployment with no failover. Tier 2 service but customers depend on daily usage calculations and analytics reports.
mitigation_gap: Single AZ, no SLO, no failover

title: Notification Service - Single AZ Deployment No Failover
description: Notification service is deployed in single AZ with no failover. Service alerts may be delayed or lost during AZ outages. Service currently at 98.76% SLO (below 99% target). No dead letter queue for failed notifications.

title: Fulfillment Service - No Circuit Breaker on Sync Dependencies
description: Settlement service makes synchronous calls to state-manager and workflow-executor without circuit breaker protection. A timeout in either dependency cascades to settlement processing failures. Service had connection pool exhaustion incident 116 days ago.

title: Analytics Dashboard - Single AZ with No Circuit Breaker
description: Analytics dashboard is single AZ deployed with no failover and no circuit breaker on downstream calls. Tier 3 service but operations team depends on it for monitoring. SLO target of 99% but current is 99.12%.
